\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4416 introduces Eigenvalue as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathrm{d}X_t = -\nabla V_{\pi}(X_t)\,\mathrm{d}t + \sqrt{2D_{\pi}}\,\mathrm{d}W_t + \lambda\,F_{\mathrm{ent}}[\Psi_1,\Psi_2]\,\mathrm{d}t, \label{eq:stochastic-TZP} \end{equation}
